description.content: Ingest and manage monitoring alerts
Ingests a monitoring alert into BigPanda for correlation and incident management.

Ingest change events for correlation
Ingests a change event (deployment, config change) for alert correlation.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Access audit logs
Returns audit log entries for API and user activity.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

The BigPanda API enables IT operations teams to programmatically manage incidents, alerts, environments, enrichments, maintenance plans, and correlation patterns. BigPanda uses AI to correlate alerts from multiple monitoring systems into actionable incidents.
